title: TokenTon26 - Consumer Apps Track $8500 Prize Pool

audit.reason: The submission is incomplete, lacking full technical details and implementation.
audit.improvements: Complete the Smart Contract code for 'EventTicket' to provide a full implementation. Ensure to include functions for transferring tickets, handling ticket URI management, and other necessary business logic. Additionally, expand upon the user application section, detailing how IPFS is integrated and how the frontend improves user experience. Include user interface screenshots or wireframes to demonstrate usability.
